command:
echo '=== SSH REACHABILITY FROM vm-claude-hub ==='
for target in 192.168.0.192 192.168.0.199 192.168.0.201 192.168.0.202 192.168.0.203 192.168.0.204 192.168.0.205; do
  result=$(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=5 -o BatchMode=yes jose@$target "hostname && df -h / | tail -1 | awk '{print \$3"/"\$2}'" 2>&1)
  echo "  $target: $result"
done
echo DONE_1886
